title: practical english usage - Part 107
content:
In American English singular verbs are normal with most of these nouns in all committee club       firm       party      union class      family      orchestra    team choir        football team)   ministry     staff the BBC      England (the       jury        school bank      company    government   public in British English: Examples of group nouns which  can be used with both singular and plural verbs The group gave its first concert in June and they are now planning a tour.

Sometimes singular and plural forms are mixed.

(More natural than A team who are full...) A team which is full of enthusiasm has a better chance of winning.

The team are full of enthusiasm.

this, that), singular verbs and pronouns are normal. Compare: When  a group noun is used with a singular determiner (e.g. a/an, each, every, The committee, which is elected at the annual meeting,. ..

The committee, who are hoping to announce important changes,...

We   prefer who as a relative pronoun with plural forms, and which with singular My company was founded in the 18th century.

- My company are wonderful. They do all they can for me.

The average family has 3.6 members. It is smaller than 50 years ago.

- My family have decided to move to York. They're going in April.

common when the group is seen as an impersonal unit. Compare: personal things like deciding, hoping or wanting. Singular forms are more Plural forms are common when the group is seen as a collection of people doing The team is/are going to lose.

groups of people, can have either singular or plural verbs and pronouns.

In British English, singular words like family, team, government, which  refer to 1  groups      of  people:    The     team      is/are     ...

128 singular      expressions         with    plural     ver  bs For the use of structures with  's to talk about possession, relationships, etc, ►     124.

a child's 'bicycle (a kind of bicycle) Here, too, there are exceptions.

the goat's 'tail (not a kind of tail) - 'goat's milk (a kind of milk) my brother's house (not a kind of house) - a doll's house (a kind of house) first noun. Compare: Classifying expressions with possessive 's most often have the main stress on the 4 pronunciation Section11 Nouns     and   Noun    Phrases;     Agreement grammar »129     plural expressions with singular verbs For singular and plural verbs in relative clauses after one of.. ., ►     130.1.

One of my friends is getting married, (     One-of my friends are-. ..) Expressions beginning one of normally have a plural noun and a singular verb.

4 one     of  ...

More than one person is going to have to find a new job.

More than one is generally used with a singular noun and verb.

3 more      than      one For more about spoken calculations, ►    322.21  322.22.

Ten times five is fifty, (   Ten fives are fifty.) Two and two is/are four.

calculations.

Singular verbs are often possible after plural number subjects in spoken 2 calculations More than 41 inches of snow has fallen on the city this winter.

'We've only got five cans ofjuice left.' 'That isn't enough.' Twenty miles is a long way to walk.

Where is that five pounds I lent you? (     Where ore those five pounds ...?) determiners, verbs and pronouns, even if the noun is plural.

When  we  talk about amounts and quantities we  usually use singular 1  amounts       and   quantities:       that     five     pounds 129 plural     expressions         with    singular      verbs For singular and plural nouns with fractions, ►     130.10.
